name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next state *)
Next == \/ (* Philosopher i picks up left fork *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                /\ forks[i] = 0
                /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![LEFT(i)] = 1]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up right fork *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                /\ forks[i] = 1
                /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![RIGHT(i)] = 1]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down left fork *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks[i] = 1
                /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 1
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![LEFT(i)] = 0]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down right fork *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks[i] = 1
                /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 1
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE
        /\ LET maxNum == Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})
           IN /\ num[i] = maxNum + 1
              /\ flag[i] = TRUE
        /\ \E j \in 1..N :
            /\ flag[j] = TRUE
            /\ num[j] < num[i]
            \/ /\ num[j] = num[i]
               /\ j < i
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ count < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, 1)
  \/ /\ count > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A r \in Readers : ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ epsilon > 0

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg - clocks[i])]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \A j \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks'[j] = clocks[j] + offsets[j]
          /\ offsets'[j] = offsets[j] + (Avg - clocks[j])
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ Avg = (1/N) * \Sum i \in 1..N : clocks[i] + offsets[i]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLE free, allocated, p

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \notin DOMAIN allocated
          /\ \E p \in free:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in free: p']
              /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in DOMAIN allocated:
          /\ \E p \in allocated[c]:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in allocated[c]: p']
              /\ free' = free \cup {p}

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \subseteq [Client -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in DOMAIN allocated: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0, 1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1 - turn
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 1 ELSE 0]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 0 ELSE wants[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
          /\ \A i \in {0, 1} : wants[i] \in {0, 1}

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
Next == /\ \E n \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
          /\ \E m \in Node :
              /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![m] = [k \in Node |-> IF k = n THEN counts[n][k] + 1 ELSE counts[m][k]]]
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
